query:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(se.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS business_date,
       se.stationCode,
       pc.categoryName,
       pc.brandName,
       pc.subtypeCode,
       COUNT(*) AS event_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN psd.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS detail_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN psd.id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_detail_count
FROM station_events se
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id
LEFT JOIN product_categories pc ON pc.id = se.categoryId
WHERE se.operatorUserId = 750212
  AND se.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(UTC_DATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(se.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d'), se.stationCode, pc.categoryName, pc.brandName, pc.subtypeCode
HAVING missing_detail_count > 0 OR detail_count > 0
ORDER BY business_date DESC, se.stationCode, missing_detail_count DESC, event_count DESC;

       se.stationCode,
       pc.categoryName,
       pc.brandName,
       pc.subtypeCode,
       COUNT(*) AS event_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN psd.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS detail_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN psd.id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_detail_count
FROM station_events se
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id
LEFT JOIN product_categories pc ON pc.id = se.categoryId
WHERE se.operatorUserId = 750212
  AND se.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(UTC_DATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(se.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d'), se.stationCode, pc.categoryName, pc.brandName, pc.subtypeCode
HAVING missing_detail_count > 0 OR detail_count > 0
ORDER BY business_date DESC, se.stationCode, missing_detail_count DESC, event_count DESC;
